title.en: China-to-Canada Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Canadian requirements: Transport Canada TDG rules, UN 38.3 transport testing, Health Canada consumer product safety obligations, retailer-requested CSA/SCC certification, bilingual English/French labelling, and the absence of a single national conformity mark.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与加拿大要求对照：加拿大运输部危险货物运输规则、UN 38.3运输测试、加拿大卫生部消费品安全义务、零售商常要求的CSA/SCC认证、英法双语标签，以及不存在单一全国合格标志。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與加拿大要求對照：加拿大運輸部危險品運輸規則、UN 38.3運輸測試、加拿大衛生部消費品安全義務、零售商常要求的CSA/SCC認證、英法雙語標籤，以及不存在單一全國合格標誌。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal, logistics, product-safety, and certification advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, retailer approval, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律、物流、产品安全及认证顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、零售商批准或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律、物流、產品安全及認證顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、零售商批准或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Canada should not rely on CCC, GB 31241, or a CE-style single mark. Canada typically requires TDG/UN 38.3 transport documentation, CCPSA consumer product safety controls, bilingual English/French labelling, and, in many retail channels, certification or listing to Canadian electrical safety standards by an SCC-accredited body such as CSA, UL, or Intertek.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口加拿大时，不应依赖CCC、GB 31241或类似CE的单一标志。加拿大通常需要TDG/UN 38.3运输文件、CCPSA消费品安全控制、英文/法文双语标签，并且在许多零售渠道中，还需要由SCC认可机构（如CSA、UL或Intertek）按加拿大电气安全标准进行认证或列名。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口加拿大時，不應依賴CCC、GB 31241或類似CE的單一標誌。加拿大通常需要TDG/UN 38.3運輸文件、CCPSA消費品安全控制、英文/法文雙語標籤，並且在許多零售渠道中，還需要由SCC認可機構（如CSA、UL或Intertek）按加拿大電氣安全標準進行認證或列名。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, primary legal source, or Canadian government standards/certification source preferred. Official URLs from tc.canada.ca, laws-lois.justice.gc.ca, canada.ca, ised-isde.canada.ca, or equivalent Canadian authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
